## Summary

Describe the problem and the smallest change that solves it.

## Public API impact

- [ ] No public API change
- [ ] Public API change documented in `docs/API.md`
- [ ] Serialization or saved-state compatibility changed and is documented

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Tests cover the behavior change
- [ ] Relevant README and CHANGELOG entries are updated

## Scope

- [ ] The change is limited to the requested behavior
- [ ] Examples remain private and are not part of the npm release
